data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of a partial refund for the unused portion, but the evidence does not provide any information on how foreign exchange (FX) differences are managed during refunds. The linked use case mentions refund logic that handles FX differences, but there is no concrete evidence or details provided to confirm that this logic is implemented or functioning as required. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected behavior of the refund process is not substantiated by the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of refund logic that handles FX differences.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
